all.en: During the long rainy season, I started feeling bored and trapped inside my small apartment.
all.zh: 在漫長的雨季期間，我開始對被困在小公寓裡感到無聊。

all.en: To brighten my balcony, I decided to start a small home gardening project.
all.zh: 為了讓陽台增添生氣，我決定開始一個小型的家庭園藝計畫。

all.en: I visited the local plant shop and bought soil, pots and several types of seeds.
all.zh: 我去了在地的植物店，買了泥土、花盆和好幾種種子。

all.en: The friendly owner recommended easy plants for beginners, such as basil, mint and cherry tomatoes.
all.zh: 親切的店主推薦了適合初學者的容易種植的植物，例如羅勒、薄荷和小番茄。

all.en: I carefully followed her instructions about watering schedules and sunlight requirements.
all.zh: 我仔細遵照她關於澆水時間表和日照需求的指示。

all.en: During the first week, nothing seemed to happen, and I worried that I had failed.
all.zh: 在第一週，似乎什麼動靜也沒有，我擔心自己已經失敗了。

all.en: Then, tiny green sprouts suddenly appeared overnight after a heavy thunderstorm.
all.zh: 接著，在一場大雷雨後的一夜之間，小小的綠色嫩芽突然冒了出來。

all.en: Watching the plants grow taller each day became an unexpected source of daily joy.
all.zh: 看著植物每天長高一些，成了一個出乎意料的日常快樂來源。

all.en: Last weekend, I harvested fresh basil leaves to make homemade pasta sauce.
all.zh: 上個週末，我採收了新鮮的羅勒葉來製作自製的義大利麵醬。

all.en: The flavor of homegrown herbs is far richer than anything sold at the supermarket.
all.zh: 自家種植的香草風味遠遠勝過超市販售的任何香草。

all.en: My balcony has transformed into a tiny green paradise that welcomes me every morning.
all.zh: 我的陽台已蛻變成一座小小的綠色天堂，每天早上都歡迎著我。

all.en: Gardening has taught me patience and the simple satisfaction of nurturing living things.
all.zh: 園藝教會了我耐心，以及照料生命所帶來的單純滿足感。

all.en: As summer arrived, my balcony garden expanded to include peppers, lettuce and strawberries.
all.zh: 夏天到來時，我的陽台花園擴展到了辣椒、萵苣和草莓。

all.en: I built simple wooden shelves to make better use of the limited vertical space.
all.zh: 我自製了簡單的木架，以便更有效地利用有限的垂直空間。

all.en: My downstairs neighbor noticed my plants and asked for some basil seedlings of her own.
all.zh: 樓下的鄰居注意到了我的植物，並開口要了一些自己用的羅勒幼苗。

all.en: We started exchanging gardening tips and small surplus harvests almost every weekend.
all.zh: 我們開始幾乎每個週末都交換園藝技巧和多餘的少量收成。

all.en: During a hot afternoon, I installed a small drip irrigation system using plastic bottles.
all.zh: 在一個炎熱的下午，我用塑膠瓶安裝了一套小型的滴灌系統。

all.en: The system saved water and ensured the plants stayed hydrated even on the busiest workdays.
all.zh: 這套系統節省了用水，並確保植物在最忙碌的工作日也能保持水份。

all.en: One morning, I discovered tiny butterflies and bees visiting the flowering tomato plants.
all.zh: 某天早晨，我發現了小蝴蝶和蜜蜂在開花的番茄植株上來訪。

all.en: Watching nature thrive in such a small space brought me unexpected feelings of peace.
all.zh: 看著大自然在如此小的空間裡蓬勃生長，帶給我意想不到的平靜感受。

all.en: I started a simple notebook to record growth, harvests and lessons learned each month.
all.zh: 我開始用一本簡單的筆記本記錄每個月的生長狀況、收成和學到的心得。

all.en: My tiny balcony has become proof that even a busy city dweller can live closer to nature.
all.zh: 我小小的陽台已成為一個證明，就連忙碌的都市居民也能更貼近大自然生活。

all.en: As autumn approached, my balcony garden slowly transitioned to hardier plants suited for cooler weather.
all.zh: 秋天接近時，我的陽台花園慢慢轉換成適合涼爽天氣、較為耐寒的植物。

all.en: I planted kale, spinach and several types of root vegetables in deeper rectangular planting boxes.
all.zh: 我在較深的長方形種植箱裡種下了羽衣甘藍、菠菜和幾種根莖類蔬菜。

all.en: My downstairs neighbor began joining me for weekly Sunday morning garden inspections and tea chats.
all.zh: 我樓下的鄰居開始每週日早上和我一起進行花園巡視，並一邊喝茶聊天。

all.en: Together we built a small composting station to recycle kitchen scraps into rich, dark fertilizer.
all.zh: 我們一起建造了一個小型堆肥站，把廚餘回收成肥沃的深色肥料。

all.en: My harvests began producing enough vegetables to fill my dining table multiple times every single week.
all.zh: 我的收成開始能採收到足以每週多次擺滿餐桌的蔬菜。

all.en: I invited friends over for a seasonal dinner featuring dishes made entirely from balcony-grown ingredients.
all.zh: 我邀請朋友過來享用一頓季節晚餐，菜餚完全以陽台種植的食材製作。

all.en: They were amazed that an ordinary apartment could produce such fresh, fragrant and colorful meals.
all.zh: 他們很驚訝一間普通的公寓竟然能產出如此新鮮、芳香又色彩繽紛的餐點。

all.en: A community magazine reporter interviewed me for an article about urban gardening in small spaces.
all.zh: 一位社區雜誌的記者採訪了我，為一篇關於小空間都市園藝的文章撰寫內容。

all.en: The published story inspired several neighbors to start their own balcony gardens around our building.
all.zh: 刊出的報導激勵了好幾位鄰居在我們大樓裡開始他們自己的陽台花園。

all.en: Our once-quiet building has slowly bloomed into a friendly, green and surprisingly connected vertical neighborhood.
all.zh: 我們曾經寧靜的大樓已慢慢綻放成一個友善、綠意盎然且意想不到緊密相連的垂直社區。
